title: Evaluate the role of vigilance mechanisms in ensuring ethical governance. Assess their limitations in preventing large-scale corruption.
description: Q7. Evaluate the role of vigilance mechanisms in ensuring ethical governance. Assess their limitations in preventing large-scale corruption.
